---

## Analyze Phase Results — 2026-02-23

### Active Position Verdicts (9/9 complete)

| Ticker | Verdict | Rule | P/L | Key Factor |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **NU** | **REDUCE** | Rule 1 | +5.5% | GATED (2 days to earnings Feb 25), profitable → trim now |
| **STIM** | MONITOR | Rule 16 | -11.6% | WITHIN (8 days), bearish momentum, R1 at $1.25 staged |
| **IONQ** | **HOLD w/ AWARENESS** | Rule 5 | -28.1% | Recovery + GATED (2 days to earnings Feb 25) + P/L <= -10% |
| **UAMY** | MONITOR | Rule 9 | -7.2% | Recovery + bearish-leaning technicals, reserves ACTIVE |
| **USAR** | MONITOR | Rule 9 | -19.9% | Recovery + bearish, pool exhausted, catalyst thesis intact |
| **INTC** | HOLD | Rule 10 | -5.2% | Recovery + other (not bearish-all), bullets ACTIVE |
| **APLD** | MONITOR | Rule 16 | -6.6% | WITHIN (6 days), B5 $27.71 pending, hyperscaler lease catalyst |
| **CIFR** | **HOLD** | Rule 2 | -1.5% | GATED (1 day to earnings Feb 24), P/L negative → hold, all buys PAUSED |
| **CLSK** | MONITOR | Rule 16 | +0.4% | WITHIN (4 days), all BUY orders ACTIVE |

### Critical Alerts

**Immediate action required:**
- **NU REDUCE** — Earnings Feb 25 (2 days). Rule 1 triggered. Trim 3 of 6 shares at market ($17.53). B2 at $14.88 stays PAUSED until post-earnings.
- **CIFR HOLD** — Earnings TOMORROW (Feb 24, 1 day). All BUY orders auto-PAUSED. SELL at $16.36 nearly hit (day high $16.18, within 2% threshold). Watch for post-earnings reaction.
- **IONQ HOLD w/ AWARENESS** — Earnings Feb 25 (2 days). Deep recovery (-28.1%). No new entries. Binary event risk.

**Near-miss fill alerts:**
- CIFR SELL $16.36: day high $16.18 exceeded the -2% proximity trigger ($16.03) — within $0.18 of execution
- CIFR B3 $14.10: day low $14.39 vs threshold $14.38 — missed by $0.01
- APLD B5 $27.71: day low $28.36 vs threshold $28.26 — missed by $0.10

### Regime / Gate Summary
- **Market Regime:** Risk-On → All Market Gates ACTIVE
- **Earnings-Blocked Orders:** NU B2 (PAUSE), CIFR B3/B4/R1 (PAUSE), IONQ no orders
- **Orders freely active:** STIM R1, UAMY R1/R2, INTC B4/R1/R2, APLD B5, CLSK B2-B4/R1-R2
